---
title: "High-efficiency [18F]fluoride pre-concentration using a laser-micromachined anion-exchange micro-cartridge"
date: 2025-03-21
author:
  - name: Gomes, Antonio Arleques
  - name: Nario, Arian Pérez
  - name: Lapolli, André Luis
  - name: Samad, Ricardo Elgul
  - name: Bernardes, Emerson Soares
  - name: De Rossi, Wagner
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "EJNMMI Radiopharmacy and Chemistry"
  volume: 10
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1186/s41181-025-00334-x"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">High-efficiency [18F]fluoride pre-concentration using a laser-micromachined anion-exchange micro-cartridge</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
